item_specifications.special_feature: Airline Approved, Durable, Foldable, Lightweight, Softsided

about_item: 【Fashion Design】The new fashionable dog purse carrier is simple and elegant, perfect for small pets daily traveling needs. Whether you are shopping, driving, traveling by plane or going to the vet, it provides a comfortable, spacious travel experience for your pet.

【Suitable Size】 Length, width, and height: 16 "* 7" * 11.5 ", suitable for small pets under 10 pounds, such as puppies（Chihuahua, Toy Poodle, Teacup, Yorkie, Mini dachshund, Pomeranian, Bichon frise, etc, cats, rabbits, etc. Please measure the length of the pet before purchase to avoid trouble.

【Convenient for Travel】 Our dog bag is breathable on all three sides. It can be partially opened or fully opened at the top, allowing pets to breathe freely. Multiple pockets for easy carrying of essential items such as mobile phones, keys, wallets, etc.

【High Quality】Our dog carrier purse is made of high quality vegan leather. Soft, lightweight, colorfast, non-deformable and can withstand daily wear and tear. Easily meet the needs of shopping, walking, traveling, outdoor activities and other travel needs.

【Airline Approval】This TSA-approved cat carrier meets most airline requirements for a relaxing, comfortable trip with your pet. But if there is any question, please let us know, we are happy to help you solve the problem and will reply you within 24 hours.

summary.text: Customers find this pet carrier to be well-made and appreciate its perfect size for dogs weighing up to 7 lbs, with one customer noting it's spacious enough for a 6 lb chihuahua. The carrier is comfortable to carry, and customers like its appearance, with one mentioning it looks like a purse. They also appreciate the pockets, with one customer specifically noting the open pocket on the other side.

authors_reviews.title: Stylish and roomy!
authors_reviews.text: This is the best dog carrier bag. I get so many compliments on it and my dog loves being in it!
authors_reviews.author: TT

authors_reviews.title: Perfect bag for your puppy
authors_reviews.text: I recently got a doxie and this is perfect, for the car, for her visits, and the quality is really good.
authors_reviews.author: Brittaney Henson

authors_reviews.title: Works great
authors_reviews.text: Perfect fit for Chihuahua pups very comfortable and sleek love the feel of it and the zip up top is perfect. Has very good quality for the price
authors_reviews.author: Kyle Mitchell

authors_reviews.title: Nice Pet Carrier
authors_reviews.text: Nice quality pet carrier just wish the the holes in the mesh were smaller because my dog's nails keep getting stuck in it and the brown color on the mesh is turning white where the nails are getting caught. Also it would be neat if the bag had high quality mesh where your pet could only see from the inside of the bag but not be able to be seen from the outside so it would be more discreet.
authors_reviews.author: Krystal

authors_reviews.title: Great bag
authors_reviews.text: This bag is fantastic. My 6lb chihuahua loves it because he can see everything without having to interact and he's a little shy. I have taken my 17lb frenchie a few places. She fits just fine too, she's just a little chubby to carry on my shoulder for long. There's a zipper pocket I can put my phone and keys on and an open pocket on the other side. It's very well made. Holds its shape. Looks like a nice purse more than a dog carrier. It's perfect.
authors_reviews.author: Kindle Customer

authors_reviews.title: Finally, an attractive dog purse that works!
authors_reviews.text: I absolutely love this bag. I have purchased so many carriers looking for one that my 8 lb. Maltese mix would like and I can carry as a purse. This is it. It’s got small outside pockets so I can put ID and money. There’s plenty of room in the bag if I need a full wallet. I can clip my keys to the purse handle. I add a blanket in the bottom and off we go. It’s got a safety clip inside. I no longer have to fight to get her in a carrier, she jumps right in.
authors_reviews.author: Jules

authors_reviews.title: Love this bag
authors_reviews.text: My toy poodle puppy is happy and comfy in this lovely bag. It cleans up nicely. I know this cause after we went for her first car ride she lost her breakfast in the bag. The bottom is removable and the lining is a breeze to wipe clean.This bag is well made and I love the rich coffee color. The bag is lightweight and the thinner straps make it easy to stay on my shoulder. Would definitely recommend.
authors_reviews.author: Mickey

authors_reviews.title: Wayyyy to big for a purse size dog
authors_reviews.author: Tana M Trammell

other_countries_reviews.author: Sayous Vera

other_countries_reviews.title: Très belle et bonne qualité !
other_countries_reviews.text: Exactement comme l’image, très belle et bonne qualité ! Mon petit chihuahua a beaucoup de place. Les 3 pochettes externes sont très pratiques, je peux ranger mon gros portefeuille et mon cellulaire.
other_countries_reviews.author: Mini-Fée

other_countries_reviews.title: Perfekte tasche
other_countries_reviews.text: Sehr schöne Tasche, hochwertig, hat bisher sehr gut gehalten und würde ich wieder kaufen.
other_countries_reviews.author: amelie

other_countries_reviews.title: Good quality
other_countries_reviews.text: Good quality bag and although dog no long sits in it, it is great for carrying and storing her stuff
other_countries_reviews.author: Jacqui Clatworthy

other_countries_reviews.title: Great, stylish carry bag
other_countries_reviews.text: This looks like an expensive leather handbag and is nice and flexible, hold its shape but not too rigid and not too soft. I ordered the darker brown and it's much nicer in real life than the photos, more of a rich maple wood brown with natural looking texture. Very discreet, took the dog shopping in the supermarket and people didn't realise she was in there! She had no issue with the bag and was happily carried for 1 hour without fuss. Nice that there are side pockets too for my phone, purse and collapsible doggy water bowl. Straps stay on the shoulder when carrying as they are nice and thin compared to others that I tried that slip off. Stylish and practical, I will be using this bag daily, highly recommend
other_countries_reviews.author: Tinalist
